parameters.query: INSERT INTO apex_escalades (timestamp, audit_payload, plan_response, tokens_input, tokens_output, status, kevin_notified) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, false) RETURNING id, timestamp;

parameters.subject: =[Apex] Plan d'escalade #{{$('Parse Claude Response').first().json.request_id}} prêt
parameters.html:
=

Apex Audit escalade traité

Score : {{$('Format Audit Payload').first().json.audit.score}}/100

Tokens : in={{$('Parse Claude Response').first().json.tokens_input}} / out={{$('Parse Claude Response').first().json.tokens_output}}

Status : {{$('Parse Claude Response').first().json.status}}

{{$('Parse Claude Response').first().json.plan_response}}

parameters.query: UPDATE apex_escalades SET kevin_notified = true WHERE id = $1;

meta.description: Receives an Apex audit via webhook, escalates to Claude (Anthropic Opus), persists the plan in PostgreSQL (apex_escalades), and notifies Kevin by email.
